parsed.reason: The rationale clearly and correctly identifies the event as a pediatric appointment reminder. It accurately describes the key characteristics of the signal: (1) it's automated and one-way, (2) it concerns an existing well-baby visit, (3) it provides specific appointment details (date, time, provider), and (4) it only requires opt-out action, not confirmation or engagement. The rationale directly matches the signal content and appropriately justifies the event_type classification.
